caption: A man with glasses, a white shirt, a bow tie, and a tall, light-gray wig sits in a studio setting. He wears black headphones and is positioned behind a professional microphone. In the background, walls are decorated with framed photographs and clothing racks featuring "LEE" branded apparel. To the left and right of the man, on-screen logos for a podcast are visible, containing the text "BOSS TALK JOY" and "PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man remains relatively still, maintaining a contemplative expression while looking slightly to his left. There is very little movement between the frames, with only minor shifts in his facial expression and posture as he listens or prepares to speak. The lighting is bright and consistent, highlighting the textures of his clothing and the detailed background of the studio.
